user.title: Connection type
user.description: Choose how this integration connects to Alby Hub. Warning: this is beta software and may cause financial loss under some conditions. Use only small test amounts. You are responsible for safe usage.

cloud.title: Cloud mode (NWC)
cloud.description: Paste the NWC connection string from Alby Hub. Warning: beta software can fail or behave unexpectedly and could lead to financial loss. Do not test with large amounts. Learn more: https://github.com/northpower25/ha-btc-alby-hub-integration/tree/HEAD/docs/handbook.en.md

data.network_api_base: Network API base URL (for own node / mempool API)
data.allow_continue_with_warning: Continue with warning (I understand the beta risk and my responsibility)

expert.title: Expert mode
expert.description: Use local hub URL and optionally prioritize ws://<host>:3334 relay proxy. Warning: beta software can fail or behave unexpectedly and could lead to financial loss. Do not test with large amounts.
